description_long: This is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust, angular frame predominantly finished in black and metallic silver. The body features a series of vented ridges along the top, likely for heat dissipation, and a yellow accent near the muzzle. The grip is made of wood with ergonomic finger grooves and a cutout, providing a secure hold. The trigger area is protected by a large, rounded guard, and there are visible mechanical components such as a safety switch and a loading port. The overall design suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm with a blend of modern and classic materials.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a black and metallic body, wooden ergonomic grip, and yellow muzzle accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow muzzle, vented top rail, and the width of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the metallic body, safety switch, loading port, and wooden grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden grip's full shape and the alignment of the top rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the trigger guard, mechanical details, and the continuation of the metallic and black finish.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented top rail and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves or reinforcement
